title: Woods Perfected
description: An overhaul of every wood in the game. From bark to button to bookshelves, every texture is perfect.
body:
**WOODS PERFECTED**

Welcome to Version 5 of Woods Perfected, the largest and most ambitious update yet. After 4 years of revamping and rethinking minecraft woods, I think I have finally earned the title of this pack. If your familiar with V4 or a older, then strap in. Not one plank has been left unturned for version 5.0.

[Some textures require Optifine or Optifine alternatives]

![Planks Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28794ba28321e969b5377bd7e5c18d972083528d.png)
![Variated Planks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5df5f44f392736d7df543070fa6c244a9e79014c.png)
Planks have both been recolored and all have new, unique patterns. Woods like spruce, jungle and cherry utilize variated textures while others such a mangrove have an all new shape to stand apart from the rest.

![Deco Label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ebe30a0cc31d107500db11fcf96e5515aa0b547.png)
![Buttons and plates](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8de41251e057de4aaf50ebd03099845b89636617_0.webp)

All buttons, pressure plates, fences and doors have received a revamping. Each block now has a unique texture that better fits their shape and size. Doors have received a subtle 3d revamp.

![book label](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae4764d5e59870089bb36012df920426cc62b68.png)
![book photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b1eec845658bdef33427398fbc96c522a93c1de_0.webp)

I’m really happy with these bookshelves, they're just really pretty (: Not to mention how long it took to make them variated AND connected while improving on the vanilla vibe

Download the pack for all that and more, and most importantly, enjoy!
